Quote Summary
The Problem

MOST PRODUCERS THINK
THEY KNOW THEIR COSTS

After 30 years in ready mix, the truth is clear: the gap between what operators think their costs are and what they actually are is where margin goes to die.

It's never the big obvious line items. It's the costs hiding inside the big buckets nobody breaks open. The ones that never get assigned to the mix. The ones that only show up when you build from the bottom up.

🔧

Maintenance — The Real Number

Drum wear, tire wear by route, mixer chutes, water lines, batch components. Each with their own replacement cycle and real cost per yard — never lumped together.

📉

Depreciation & Capital Costs

Every truck aging out, every plant running product. True cost of capital — assigned to the mix where it belongs.

💧

Material Leakage & Variance

Aggregate shrinkage between the pile and the drum. Admixture dosage running over spec. A penny a gallon on water across 50,000 yards adds up fast.

👷

Labor, Overtime & Workers Comp

Saturday pour overtime. Workers comp loaded properly against driver hours. Technology costs. Company vehicles. None of it belongs in a single bucket.

How It Works

BUILT THE WAY PRODUCERS
ACTUALLY OPERATE

ReadyBuild Producer connects your real mix designs to your real material costs — no dispatch export required.

01

Enter Your Plants & Costs

Set up Master Plant Data with capacity, cycle times, fixed costs, and labor. Material Price Master becomes your single source of truth for every raw material price by plant.

02

Import Your Mix Designs

Paste your actual mix design data from your dispatch system. The Material Alias Map resolves ingredient name differences automatically — no manual mapping required.

03

Engine Calculates Costs

Process Import calculates true material cost per yard for every mix at every active plant — ingredient by ingredient, with full UOM conversion and admixture dosing logic.

04

Quote With Confidence

Enter any job address, mix ID, and yardage. Quote Summary instantly recommends the lowest-cost qualified plant, with full margin, delivery, and profit analysis.

The Platform

EVERY TAB HAS A PURPOSE

No bloat. No filler. Every screen earns its place in the workflow.

Quote Summary ranks every active plant for a given mix and job address — showing mix cost, delivery cost, plant ops, SG&A, total cost, recommended price, margin, and profit per yard. One screen. All the information needed to make a confident decision.

Master Plant Data is the single source of truth for every plant's fixed costs — depreciation, maintenance, utilities, insurance, technology, labor rates, cycle times, and capacity. All downstream calculations flow from here.

Material Price Master tracks every raw material price by plant — cement, SCMs, aggregates, admixtures, water, fiber. Prices are entered once and flow through every calculation. Purchase UOM and Mix Design UOM are handled automatically with full conversion logic.

Mix Cost Engine calculates true material cost per cubic yard for every mix at every active plant — updated instantly when you run Process Import against your current mix design data. This is the foundation every quote is built on.

Why ReadyBuild Producer

INTELLIGENCE, NOT JUST
A QUOTING TOOL

You Own It

One-time purchase. No subscriptions. No per-plant fees. No per-user pricing. No annual renewals. No vendor lock-in. The tool is yours — forever.

Your Mix Designs

Costs are calculated from your actual mix designs — not generic templates, not dispatch exports, not vendor estimates. Your data. Your reality.

Built by a Producer

30 years in ready mix. This tool was built by someone who has sat in every seat — operations, sales, management. It thinks the way producers think.

Multi-Plant Intelligence

Up to 20 plants. Every quote automatically identifies the lowest-cost qualified plant for the job — factoring in material cost, delivery, plant ops, and margin targets.

Full Cost Stack

Material cost is just the start. Delivery, plant fixed costs, labor, SG&A, depreciation, maintenance — every cost category is loaded and assigned to every yard you produce.

Excel-Native

No new software to learn. No IT required. No integration projects. Works where your team already works — and you can see every formula, every calculation, every assumption.
